/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Boss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/ConfigManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/EndScenes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/FloatingTextManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/GameplayScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/LocalizationManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/MenuScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/ParticleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o RalphArcade   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lraylib -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL
